name: Registry Key Import Detected
description: Detects the import of registry keys using `regedit.exe`. Adversaries can use this to add malicious keys for persistence or other malicious purposes. Importing registry data is a less common legitimate activity, making it a strong indicator of potential abuse.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'regedit.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the regedit.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute regedit.exe, including import flags and a .reg file.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which regedit.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
